text:
Once upon a time in the magical forest of Eldoria, there was a little owl named Owlie who loved to listen to the songs of the birds.

One morning, Owlie heard a new song that filled him with joy. He flew down to listen, and what did he hear?

"A merry little owl we."

He liked that! That night he sang the song beautifully.

The next day, Owlie saw the mouse who sang that.

"Oh dear! You sing like an owl," he said.

"We big owls love your voice!"

That made Owlie very happy.

Every day they sang together.

Eventually, they became friends. Owlie was fortunate.

That's my favorite story.
